Bereits auf den ersten Blick punktet der Kühlschrank durch seine klassische weiße Farbgebung.   Wie fällt die Energiebilanz des Kühlschranks aus?   Um die Kosten abschätzen zu können, empfiehlt sich ein Blick auf den jährlichen Energieverbrauch. Dieser liegt mit etwa 137 kWh in einem guten Bereich.   Wieviel Platz bietet der Kühlschrank?   Die Kühlfächer fassen bis zu 107 Liter Inhalt. Mit einem Thermostat wird die Temperatur in Ihrem Kühlschrank perfekt reguliert. Ihre Lebensmittel können Sie auf den zwei Ablagefächern ordentlich unterbringen. Zusätzlicher Komfort: Eines der Fächer lässt sich verstellen. Sie können die Temperatur des Kühlteiles selbst bestimmen. Weiterhin beträgt das Ladevolumen des Gefrierfachs 13 Liter. Das Gefrierteil lässt sich ebenfalls nach Ihren Wünschen temperieren.   Warum dürfen Sie sich diesen Kühlschrank nicht entgehen lassen?   Damit Sie Ihre Lieblingssnacks auch zu später Stunde finden, verfügt der Kühlschrank über eine praktische Innenbeleuchtung.       Überzeugen Sie sich am besten selbst von dem großartigen RB 492 PW von GORENJE! Join us as a Lead Customer Facing Backend Engineer and drive innovation at the intersection of technology and customer success. Design, implement, and deliver scalable SaaS solutions, collaborate with global teams, and shape the future of digital experiences at Adobe. Grow your career with cutting-edge tools and a world-class engineering environment.
Senior Customer Facing Software Engineer (https://careers.adobe.com/us/en/job/R163150/Senior-Customer-Facing-Software-Engineer)
Join our team as a Senior Customer Facing Software Engineer and drive innovation at the intersection of technology and customer success. Design, implement, and deliver scalable SaaS solutions, collaborate with global teams, and shape the future of digital experiences at Adobe. Grow your career with cutting-edge tools and a world-class engineering environment.
Senior Customer Facing Applied AI Engineer (https://careers.adobe.com/us/en/job/R163146/Senior-Customer-Facing-Applied-AI-Engineer)
Join our team as a Senior Customer Facing Applied AI Engineer and help shape the future of digital experiences at Adobe. Drive innovation by integrating AI into real-world solutions, collaborating with global teams, and delivering impactful customer success stories. If you excel in Python, AI, and customer engagement, this is your next challenge!
Join our team as a Senior Forward Deployed Engineer and drive the future of digital experiences at Adobe. Leverage your expertise in Python, AI, and cloud platforms to bridge engineering and customer needs. Collaborate globally, innovate with cutting-edge tools, and make a real impact on customer success across the industry.
Senior Forward Deployed Engineer (Backend) (https://careers.adobe.com/us/en/job/R163291/Senior-Forward-Deployed-Engineer-Backend)
Join our team as a Senior Forward Deployed Engineer and drive innovation at the intersection of engineering and customer needs. Lead the design and implementation of scalable, production-ready systems using Java, Spring Boot, and cloud platforms. Collaborate globally, mentor peers, and shape the future of digital experiences at Adobe.
Exciting opportunity for a Principal Product Manager to lead the Acrobat Product Management team at Adobe. Drive enterprise adoption, shape product strategy, and mentor cross-functional teams. Join us to impact billions in revenue and deliver innovative digital experiences for large enterprises. Grow your career with a global leader in digital transformation.
Remote, Ontario, Canada
Join our team as a Senior Backend Engineer and help shape the future of Frame.io, the world’s largest Elixir application. Drive the design and implementation of scalable, high-performance backend systems, mentor engineers, and collaborate with top talent to deliver innovative solutions that inspire creativity and make a real impact.
San Jose, California, United States of America
Join our team as a Senior AI Engineer and help build cutting-edge AI solutions at Adobe. Leverage your expertise in Python, LLMs, and cloud platforms to deliver impactful business intelligence and personalization. Collaborate with stakeholders, own the full lifecycle of AI products, and drive innovation in a fast-paced, growth-focused environment.
Join our team as a Senior Software Engineer II and drive innovation at Adobe! Lead end-to-end software projects, leverage your expertise in Scala, Java, and cloud platforms, and shape scalable solutions. Collaborate with top talent in a dynamic environment and make a real impact on world-class engineering projects. Grow your career with us in Noida!
Join our team as a Senior Computer Scientist II and help shape the future of digital experiences at Adobe. Drive the development of large-scale, high-performance ML services and distributed systems. Collaborate with top engineers to build innovative solutions powering billions of users worldwide. Grow your career with cutting-edge technologies in a dynamic, global environment.
